error_signature: Token type `html_raw` not supported by Markdown parser
title: Discourse HTML raw token error when posting
symptom: When attempting to create a new thread in Discourse with preformatted text, an error occurs stating 'Token type `html_raw` not supported by Markdown parser'. This results in the removal of all post content.
not_this_if: Using standard text editor without preformatted text
root_cause: The Discourse Markdown parser does not support the `html_raw` token type, which leads to errors when users try to post content formatted in a way that includes unsupported tokens. This can happen when workflows are copied in a specific format that Discourse cannot interpret.
fix_steps: Switch to the standard Markdown editor in Discourse.
Copy and paste the workflow content directly into the editor without using preformatted text.
agent_instruction: Switch to the standard Markdown editor and paste the workflow content directly.
